title: Non-Solicitation & Contingent Worker Policy
status: stub — chapter content to be populated
description: HR policy behind two recurring contract positions: the shape of acceptable non-solicitation clauses, and engagement of contractors/contingent workers including off-payroll (IR35) status determination.
related_legislation: Income Tax (Earnings and Pensions) Act 2003, Part 2 Ch. 10 (off-payroll working)

chapters.title: Non-Solicitation Positions
chapters.synopsis: Acceptable non-solicit clauses: mutual only (one-way clauses removed), limited to targeted poaching of individuals involved in the engagement, maximum 6-month tail, general-advertisement carve-out.

chapters.title: Contingent Worker Engagement
chapters.synopsis: When and how contractors, agencies and consultants may be engaged; required contract terms (substitution, control, mutuality-of-obligation language) that reflect genuine self-employed working practices.

chapters.title: Vetting, Right to Work & Onboarding
chapters.synopsis: Pre-engagement checks for contingent workers: right-to-work verification, reference and background screening proportionate to role, and onboarding steps before systems access is granted.

chapters.title: Off-Payroll Working (IR35) Determinations
chapters.synopsis: Status-determination process under ITEPA 2003 Part 2 Ch. 10: who runs the assessment, how outside-IR35 conclusions are documented, and how contract drafting must mirror the determined status.

chapters.title: Confidentiality, IP & Systems Access
chapters.synopsis: Mandatory confidentiality and IP-assignment terms for contingent workers (aligned with the Contract Playbook IP positions), least-privilege systems access per POL-SEC-011, and equipment/data-handling rules.

chapters.title: Off-Boarding & Post-Engagement Obligations
chapters.synopsis: End-of-engagement steps: access revocation, return or deletion of Northgate materials, surviving confidentiality obligations, and re-engagement cooling-off considerations.

chapters.title: Review & Escalation
chapters.synopsis: Periodic re-assessment of engagements, disputes over status determinations, and escalation for non-standard non-solicit or worker-engagement requests.
